ddls:
CREATE TABLE "objects" (
  "obj_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each object */,
  "cls_id" INTEGER /* ID of the class the object belongs to */,
  "base_type" INTEGER /* Base type of the object */,
  "column_major" INTEGER /* Column major flag (1 = true, 0 = false) */,
  "symbolic_width" INTEGER /* Symbolic width of the object */,
  "frame_data" INTEGER /* Frame data associated with the object */,
  "arr_size_one" INTEGER /* Size of the first dimension of the object's array */,
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the object was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the object was last updated */,
  "deleted_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the object was deleted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("obj_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_objects_data_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_type_id") REFERENCES data_types ("data_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_objects_cls_id FOREIGN KEY ("cls_id") REFERENCES classes ("cls_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "classes" (
  "cls_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each class */,
  "cls_name" TEXT /* Name of the class */,
  "cls_description" TEXT /* Description of the class */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the class was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the class was last updated */,
  "deleted_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the class was deleted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cls_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "arrays" (
  "arr_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each array */,
  "obj_id" INTEGER /* ID of the object the array belongs to */,
  "arr_size_one" INTEGER /* Size of the first dimension of the array */,
  "arr_size_two" INTEGER /* Size of the second dimension of the array */,
  "arr_type" TEXT /* Type of the array (e.g., integer, float, symbol) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the array was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the array was last updated */,
  "deleted_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the array was deleted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("arr_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_arrays_obj_id FOREIGN KEY ("obj_id") REFERENCES objects ("obj_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "symbolic_data" (
  "sym_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each symbolic data entry */,
  "obj_id" INTEGER /* ID of the object the symbolic data belongs to */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbolic data */,
  "symbol_width" INTEGER /* Width of the symbolic data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the symbolic data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the symbolic data was last updated */,
  "deleted_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the symbolic data was deleted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sym_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_symbolic_data_obj_id FOREIGN KEY ("obj_id") REFERENCES objects ("obj_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "frame_data" (
  "frm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each frame data entry */,
  "obj_id" INTEGER /* ID of the object the frame data belongs to */,
  "frame_data" TEXT /* Frame data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the frame data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the frame data was last updated */,
  "deleted_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the frame data was deleted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("frm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_frame_data_obj_id FOREIGN KEY ("obj_id") REFERENCES objects ("obj_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inheritance" (
  "inh_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inheritance entry */,
  "cls_id" INTEGER /* ID of the class */,
  "parent_cls_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent class */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of inheritance (e.g., single inheritance, multiple inheritance) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the inheritance was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the inheritance was last updated */,
  "deleted_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the inheritance was deleted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inh_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inheritance_cls_id FOREIGN KEY ("cls_id") REFERENCES classes ("cls_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inheritance_parent_cls_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_cls_id") REFERENCES classes ("cls_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "polymorphism" (
  "poly_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each polymorphism entry */,
  "obj_id" INTEGER /* ID of the object */,
  "poly_type" TEXT /* Type of polymorphism (e.g., function, operator) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the polymorphism was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the polymorphism was last updated */,
  "deleted_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the polymorphism was deleted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("poly_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_polymorphism_obj_id FOREIGN KEY ("obj_id") REFERENCES objects ("obj_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "encapsulation" (
  "enc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each encapsulation entry */,
  "obj_id" INTEGER /* ID of the object */,
  "enc_type" TEXT /* Type of encapsulation (e.g., public, private) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the encapsulation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the encapsulation was last updated */,
  "deleted_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the encapsulation was deleted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_encapsulation_obj_id FOREIGN KEY ("obj_id") REFERENCES objects ("obj_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "usr_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "usr_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, developer, analyst) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  "deleted_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was deleted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usr_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "usr_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the database */,
  "obj_id" INTEGER /* ID of the object being accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., read, write) */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* ID of the user session */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was last updated */,
  "deleted_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was deleted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_usr_id FOREIGN KEY ("usr_id") REFERENCES users ("usr_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_obj_id FOREIGN KEY ("obj_id") REFERENCES objects ("obj_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "perm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission entry */,
  "usr_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "obj_id" INTEGER /* ID of the object */,
  "perm_type" TEXT /* Type of permission (e.g., read, write) */,
  "scope" TEXT /* Scope of the permission (e.g., read-only, read-write) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was last updated */,
  "deleted_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was deleted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("perm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_usr_id FOREIGN KEY ("usr_id") REFERENCES users ("usr_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_obj_id FOREIGN KEY ("obj_id") REFERENCES objects ("obj_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_types" (
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data type */,
  "data_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the data type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data type was last updated */,
  "deleted_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data type was deleted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "object_class_relationships" (
  "rel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "obj_id" INTEGER /* ID of the object */,
  "cls_id" INTEGER /* ID of the class */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was last updated */,
  "deleted_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was deleted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_object_class_relationships_cls_id FOREIGN KEY ("cls_id") REFERENCES classes ("cls_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_object_class_relationships_obj_id FOREIGN KEY ("obj_id") REFERENCES objects ("obj_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "array_class_relationships" (
  "rel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "arr_id" INTEGER /* ID of the array */,
  "cls_id" INTEGER /* ID of the class */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was last updated */,
  "deleted_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was deleted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_array_class_relationships_arr_id FOREIGN KEY ("arr_id") REFERENCES arrays ("arr_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_array_class_relationships_cls_id FOREIGN KEY ("cls_id") REFERENCES classes ("cls_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "object_array_relationships" (
  "rel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "obj_id" INTEGER /* ID of the object */,
  "arr_id" INTEGER /* ID of the array */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was last updated */,
  "deleted_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was deleted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_object_array_relationships_obj_id FOREIGN KEY ("obj_id") REFERENCES objects ("obj_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_object_array_relationships_arr_id FOREIGN KEY ("arr_id") REFERENCES arrays ("arr_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_sessions" (
  "session_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each user session */,
  "usr_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the session */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the session was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the session was last updated */,
  "deleted_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the session was deleted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_sessions_usr_id FOREIGN KEY ("usr_id") REFERENCES users ("usr_id")
)
